name: Golf Anytime
address: 220 State St, Salt Lake City, UT 84111
about: Golf Anytime is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Salt Lake City, UT, offering a 24/7 accessible experience through membership or public session bookings. The facility is equipped with two Full Swing simulators, which use high-speed cameras and infrared ball tracking technology to provide detailed flight data. It caters to individual golfers, groups, and private events with a focus on affordability and technology, positioning itself as a competitive alternative to other local indoor golf and Top Golf facilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing simulator technology with superior indoor accuracy
Flexible booking options for individuals and private parties

food_and_drink.notes: BYOK (Bring Your Own) food and hot items are welcome. Candy and nutrition bars are available for on-site purchase.

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses high-speed cameras and infrared technology for accurate ball tracking.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available: Wilson clubs for $5 plus tax per session, or TaylorMade clubs for $10 plus tax per session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, customers are encouraged to bring in their own food and hot items to enjoy during their session. Candy and nutrition bars are also available for on-site purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and number of players, but a 90-minute session is a common booking length for practice or a partial game.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and kid-friendly events, with options for private parties that accommodate groups of all ages.
